title: China: Anti-Xi Jinping protests silenced ahead of 20th Communist Party Congress
description: China's Xi Jinping is expected to secure the Presidential post for a third term after the upcoming Chinese Communist Party meeting.
keywords: China, China Xi Jinping, Xi Jinping, CCP, China protests, CCP meeting, China, China Xi Jinping, Xi Jinping, CCP, China protests, CCP meeting
